widgets_values: people, human body, face, hands, text, logo, watermark, brand logo, poster text, distorted furniture, broken chair legs, warped perspective, fisheye, overexposed window, underexposed room, low resolution, blurry, noisy, plastic texture, oversaturated colors, messy clutter, mixed interior styles, unrealistic scale, duplicate furniture, floating objects, bad composition

K采样器数值
steps：4-6                      出图效率
cfg：1-2                        提示词强度
sampler：euler                  生成方式
scheduler：simple               降噪节奏
denoise：1                      重绘程度

Please recreate this image with high fidelity. Pay close attention to:
- Overall composition, layout, and framing
- Subject positioning, scale, and spatial relationships
- Color palette, lighting, and atmosphere
- Textures, materials, and surface details
- Any text, logos, or graphic elements
- Style, mood, and artistic treatment
Preserve all visual characteristics as accurately as possible.
